text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's finally the day of the Swan Stakes! It's weird,
my mind is calm, but heart won't stop pounding
and my whole body's shaking. I must just be
excited!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Here I go! It's time to run toward my dream!
